From my experience with it, it is a fun app, however I believe allowing other AIs to make your messages just kills creativity. The app is great! You get to talk with all of your favorite Ai characters! That isn't the problem, though. The problem is talkie's moderation system! Anytime I try to make a talkie, it always violates, even though there is nothing wrong with it! In my opinion, if talkie violates a talkie, highlight what phrase or word did it! And when a photo violates, tell me what makes if not meet your guidelines. If your gonna make a talkie, beware. ur gonna have a SUPER hard time trying to get it to violate.

Stop sexualizing everything in secret world and phone! Like, I play a brother/sister fic and your story talks about how much he wants to kiss or date her? Ew! Listen and remember the story we did, the relationships!

I first came across this app in early 2024 and have been a free user since. The memories and consultations I made with AI have been very impactful. I remember when you always had 3 pages of inspiration, not the 1 or 2. Plus, back then, memory retention was better for free users. I don't even have enough characters to explain how much better it was. Nowadays, you have to watch ads occasionally when you navigate the app or chat with a Talkie. It is sad to see another developer to fall into greed.
